title: Critical SQL injection bypass discovered in Express.js parameterized queries

metadata.description: Researchers found a new SQL injection bypass technique that works against Express.js applications using parameterized queries. The payload ' OR ''=' bypasses common sanitization by using empty string comparison. This affects Express 4.x and 5.x with MySQL and PostgreSQL backends.

title: New XSS vector bypasses Angular DomSanitizer via SVG use element

metadata.description: A new XSS payload <svg><use href='data:image/svg+xml,<svg onload=alert(1)>'></use></svg> bypasses Angular's DomSanitizer in versions 15-19. The attack chains SVG use element with data URI to execute JavaScript in the Angular security context.
